name: Lemongrass and chile salsa
intro: This is a fantastically fresh, spicy salsa. The combination of Asian flavors and vibrant colors will transform meat- and fish-based salads, such as the Thai-spiced lamb salad.

ingredients.item: heaping tbsp chopped Thai or Italian basil, plus 6 whole leaves to finish
red chile, seeded and finely chopped

method: Slice off the tops of the lemongrass stalks and discard them. Bash down on the bulb ends with the flat side of a large knife or pound using a kitchen mallet. Chop very finely and place in a bowl.
Add the basil, ginger, and chile. Pour in the honey, soy sauce, Thai fish sauce, and lime juice, and stir well. Cover and chill for at least 1 hour to help develop the flavors.
Stir in the whole basil leaves just before serving. The salsa can be stored in the fridge for up to 2 days.
